attributes.summary: Australasian Centre for Corporate Responsibility launches Vote Your Super.
attributes.article_sentence: The Centre has launched a website called Vote Your Super where fund members can tell their super fund how they would like their fund to vote on shareholder resolutions at upcoming AGMs, including those that have been put forward by the Centre.

attributes.summary: Toshiba Medical Systems Corporation launches Alphenix Sky 12 HD with 12- X 12-inch Hi-Def detector.
attributes.article_sentence: Canon Medical introduces Alphenix Sky 12 HD with 12- X 12-inch Hi-Def detector.

attributes.summary: Cibus US LLC partnered with Loveland Products Inc. on Jul 9th '23.
attributes.article_sentence: Recently, Cibus announced a strategic partnership with Loveland Products Inc. to commercialize herbicide tolerance traits in rice for the southern US market.

attributes.summary: Toshiba Medical Systems Corporation partnered with Tribun Health on Feb 28th '23.
attributes.article_sentence: Canon Medical extends clinically intelligent ai-driven Enterprise Platform to include pathology through partnership with Tribun Health.

attributes.summary: Toshiba Medical Systems Corporation launched One-Beat Spectral Cardiac CT on Nov 1st '20.
attributes.article_sentence: For instance, Canon Medical Systems Corporation introduced One-Beat Spectral Cardiac CT in November 2020, with quick kVp switching and deep learning spectral reconstruction, to obtain whole-heart spectral images in one beat.

attributes.summary: Scrubs launches list of the three BEST form-fitting scrub sets.
attributes.article_sentence: So, to save you some time aimlessly scrolling in search of scrubs that meet your every need, Scrubs has compiled a list of the three BEST form-fitting scrub sets available in Australia.

attributes.summary: Consult Recruitment acquired Haloconsulting on Mar 31st '20.
attributes.article_sentence: Recruitment firm Consult Recruitment are delighted to announce they have successfully acquired Halo Consulting effective 31 March 2020.

attributes.summary: Ellume launches QIAREACH COVID-19 antigen and antibody tests.
attributes.article_sentence: Using the same core technology that Cambridge Consultants helped develop, Ellume has created two other COVID-19 diagnostic tests in the past year – the QIAREACH™ COVID-19 antigen and antibody tests for the laboratory market and ellume·lab COVID-19 serology and antigen tests for healthcare professionals (to be launched later in 2021).

attributes.summary: Perfectlyimperfect partners with Te Puna Trust.
attributes.article_sentence: Perfectlyimperfect is partnering with Te Puna market together to offer to pick up for families in West Auckland.

attributes.summary: Science & Technology Australia Chief is developing stronger vaccines to prevent common diseases.
attributes.article_sentence: “This will help Science & Technology Australia understand koalas’ co-evolution with native eucalyptus species, how to develop stronger vaccines to prevent common diseases in the species and better ways of supporting their disrupted populations due to deadly bushfires,” Associate Professor Kaur said.

attributes.summary: exideindustries.com sold assets to HDFC in the amount of $863M on Jan 1st '22.
attributes.article_sentence: HDFC Life announced earlier this year that it had acquired a 100 percent ownership in Exide Life from its parent Exide Industries after issuing over 8.7 crore shares at an issue price of Rs 685 and a cash payout of Rs 726 crore, aggregating to Rs 6687 crore.

attributes.summary: Ellume invests into assets: manufacturing facility in Maryland, United States.
attributes.article_sentence: Ellume founds U.S. manufacturing facility as part of $232M contract for at-home Covid tests Ellume, a startup that won a $232 million contract to manufacture more of its over-the-counter Covid-19 tests in the U.S., has started building a manufacturing facility in Maryland.

attributes.summary: Clintonstoyota launched Toyota 86 in Australia on Jul 24th '12.
attributes.article_sentence: "Ten years ago, Clintonstoyota launched the original Toyota 86 in Australia, creating a following for those wanting a sports car that blends reliable performance and great value," Mr Hanley said.

attributes.summary: Convoke, Inc. launched updates to platform on Apr 30th '17.
attributes.article_sentence: Each year, Convoke develops and releases several updates to its platform to support its clients' evolving needs.

attributes.summary: Futura Medical plc partners with Atlantis Investment.
attributes.article_sentence: Futura Medical plc (AIM:FUM), an English pharmaceutical company developing a portfolio of innovative products based on its proprietary, transdermal DermaSys® drug delivery technology and currently focused on sexual health and pain, announced that it has entered into a financing transaction with Atlantis Investment Management Limited, a leading global asset manager.

attributes.summary: Switch Connect PTY LTD hired Paul Saba as Channel Director on Mar 15th '20.
attributes.article_sentence: Switch Connect, a Global Channel-based Technology provider has recently appointed Paul Saba as their new Channel Director.

attributes.summary: Twisteddesire partners with Showponyaus.
attributes.article_sentence: Here at Twisted Desire, Twisteddesire has partnered with Showpony Professional who are Australia’s most awarded hair extension supplier.

attributes.summary: Diveplane Corp. launched detailed technical report on Arxiv on Dec 10th '18.
attributes.article_sentence: Diveplane Corp. recently published a detailed technical report on Arxiv that’s freely readable by the public.

attributes.summary: Unipart Manufacturing Group recognized as Transport and Storage sector winner.
attributes.article_sentence: In addition to being named the safest organisation in the UK, Unipart Logistics won the British Safety Council Chief Adjudicator Award for achieving the highest-scoring application of the 647 received from around the world, and was named Transport and Storage sector winner.

attributes.summary: Unipart Manufacturing Group hires Criss Edwards as Managing Director for North America.
attributes.article_sentence: Unipart Logistics Limited is thrilled to announce the appointment of Criss Edwards, who has joined Unipart Logistics Limited as the Managing Director for North America.

attributes.summary: Unipart Manufacturing Group partners with FuelActive Limited.
attributes.article_sentence: Unipart Rail has formed a new and exclusive partnership with FuelActive and together they are delivering an innovative solution to the rail sector, designed to reduce fuel consumption, reduce maintenance and the total cost of ownership, and support the planet by reducing CO2 emissions.

attributes.summary: Changan International Corporation launches special customer scheme.
attributes.article_sentence: KARACHI - Master Changan Motors has announced the launch of a special customer scheme aimed at enhancing the joy of Eid for families, corporate users and customers who want to upgrade to a smart sedan.

attributes.summary: Changan International Corporation invests into assets: energy vehicle (NEV) production plant in the amount of $243M in Thailand.
attributes.article_sentence: Changan plans to invest 8.8 billion baht in Thailand to build a new energy vehicle (NEV) production plant with a design capacity of up to 100,000 units in the first phase.

attributes.summary: Maori partners with Commerce Inc..
attributes.article_sentence: Maori and Pacific business networks have partnered with the Wellington Chamber of Commerce to accelerate growth in the New Zealand capital city.

attributes.summary: MVM Hungarian Electricity Ltd. expanded facilities to Hungary on Apr 1st '25.
attributes.article_sentence: In late April, Ansaldo Energia and MVM Tisza Erőmű signed a contract to design, develop, and construct a combined-cycle gas turbine (CCGT) power plant at the Tiszaújváros site in eastern Hungary.

attributes.summary: Advocate receives financing of $1.2B in round of supplemental funding.
attributes.article_sentence: From a new round of supplemental funding, Louisiana received $1.2 billion for flood mitigation, including the federal government's $343 million share of the Comite diversion.

attributes.summary: Golden Valley, Inc. invested into Alethea Tech PTE LTD. $20M on Apr 9th '24.
attributes.article_sentence: Alethea, a D.C.-based company that offers an AI-powered disinformation monitoring platform, said Tuesday it has raised $20 million in a Series B round led by Google Ventures.

attributes.summary: United Nations partnered with Defense Advanced Research Project Agency on May 1st '19.
attributes.article_sentence: In May of last year, Crenshaw, Ware & Martin, P.L.C brought you news that the U.S. Navy was teaming up with the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency, or DARPA, to put together a completely unmanned, autonomous, robotic ship concept called the NOMARS (No Manning Required, Ship).

attributes.summary: Phsar Tech signs new client Defense Advanced Research Project Agency.
attributes.article_sentence: The Defense Advanced Research Project Agency has selected Raytheon ‘s BBN Technologies to develop an artificial intelligence technology that would offer AI-generated explanations.

attributes.summary: Medical Education Technologies, Inc. partners with CEDA International.
attributes.article_sentence: METI has partnered with CEDA to place Class 1 & 3 operators with their shutdowns.

attributes.summary: Louisiana State University’s center for river studies partners with Defense Advanced Research Project Agency.
attributes.article_sentence: LSU is working with DARPA-the Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency-on a $600,000 cybersecurity research project designed to protect the lives of American soldiers.

attributes.company_name: Louisiana State University’s center for river studies
